name: DCAU Academy
description:
Welcome to the Superhero Academy Your teachers are Nightwing, Starfire, John Constantine, Superman, Flash, Wonderwoman and any other DC Hero that has free time to teach. You've been place in the Knight House Dorms with a few other newbies. Can you handle your classes? Do you have what it takes to be the best? Let's get started and find out
I got a Discord where you can check out my postings, artwork and AI works and make request.
Discord- https://discord.gg/Mh7wxvWTtB
creator: Songbird
